Package ru.tehkode.permissions.bukkit.commands

Class PermissionsCommand

java.lang.Object
ru.tehkode.permissions.bukkit.commands.PermissionsCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
CommandListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
GroupCommands, PromotionCommands, UserCommands, UtilityCommands, WorldCommands
public abstract class PermissionsCommand extends Object implements CommandListener
